title: lindernia grandiflora
intro: Lindernia grandiflora, also known as blue buttons, is a flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Lindernia grandiflora include decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be used to treat various ailments.
